name: Aurora Labs Limited
summary: Aurora Labs Limited engages in the design, development, and commercialization of 3D metal printers, powders, and digital parts and its related intellectual property. The company produces the S-Titanium Pro; and develops industrial grade, high speed, and large format 3D metal printers, as well as powder manufacturing and control software used for industrial manufacturing. It also develops certification processes for parts to be used in marine, oil and gas and renewables applications, and others. The company operates in Australia, Europe, Canada, South America, the United States, and East Asia. Aurora Labs Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Canning Vale, Australia.
